title: Slider
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Slider primitive preserving controlled value arrays, deterministic normalization, clamping, step rounding, keyboard increments, pointer geometry helpers, orientation, direction, multi-thumb ordering, data attributes, and native range input form semantics.

deviations.summary: Slider values are supplied by the consuming Foldkit model rather than stored in hidden component state.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit render helpers are stateless. Keyboard, input, and pointer handlers emit value-change facts so the application update function owns the canonical value.

deviations.summary: Pointer geometry is exposed as deterministic helpers that accept measured control rectangles.
deviations.rationale: The installable source avoids shared DOM measurement infrastructure. Consumers can measure in commands and feed the rect into the pure helper while parity fixtures can test geometry deterministically.
